sentences.arabic: يَحْتَوِي الْأَدَبُ الْعَرَبِيُّ الْقَدِيمُ عَلَى حِكَمٍ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translationEn: Ancient Arabic literature contains much wisdom.

sentences.arabic: نَجِدُ فِي الْكُتُبِ نَثْراً بَلِيغاً يُعْجِبُ الْقَارِئَ.
sentences.translation: U knjigama nalazimo rječitu prozu koja zadivljuje čitaoca.
sentences.translationEn: In books, we find eloquent prose that impresses the reader.

sentences.arabic: الْكُتَّابُ الْعَرَبُ اهْتَمُّوا بِتَنْسِيقِ الْجُمَلِ وَاخْتِيَارِ الْمُفْرَدَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski pisci su vodili računa o slaganju rečenica i odabiru riječi.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic writers cared about arranging sentences and choosing vocabulary.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا النَّثْرُ يُسَاعِدُنَا عَلَى فَهْمِ التَّارِيخِ.
sentences.translation: Ova proza nam pomaže da razumijemo historiju.
sentences.translationEn: This prose helps us understand history.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَفْتَخِرُ بِهَذَا التُّرَاثِ الْأَدَبِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Ponosni smo na ovo veliko književno naslijeđe.
sentences.translationEn: We are proud of this great literary heritage.
